entry.data:
MOSTLY SUNNY AND MUCH COOLER
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 40S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY, MAINLY IN THE MORNING
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
